entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop studied for its industrial utilization in India

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study on sorghum industrial utilization is focused

entities.name: INDUSTRIAL UTILIZATION
entities.description: The use of agricultural crops for non-food industrial purposes

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The growing season during which a significant portion of sorghum is used for non-food purposes

entities.name: NONFOOD USES
entities.description: Applications of sorghum other than human consumption, including feed and alcohol

entities.name: POSTRAINY SEASON
entities.description: The growing season during which sorghum is used primarily for food purposes

entities.name: POULTRY FEED
entities.description: The industrial sector using sorghum for bird feed production

entities.name: DAIRY FEED
entities.description: The industrial sector using sorghum for cattle feed production

entities.name: GRAIN ALCOHOL
entities.description: The industrial sector using sorghum for alcohol production

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cereal crop that competes with sorghum in the poultry feed market

entities.name: TRADE LIBERALIZATION
entities.description: The reduction of trade barriers affecting the import of competing crops

entities.name: MAIZE IMPORTS
entities.description: The importation of maize which impacts the demand for domestic sorghum

entities.name: PUBLIC-PRIVATE SECTOR PARTNERSHIPS
entities.description: Collaborative arrangements to improve linkages between research and industry for market development
